arts.ttl: FA considering longer ban for Millwall's Roberts after Mateta injury
arts.sum: The FA is expected to consider whether to submit a "clearly insufficient" punishment claim that could result in a longer ban for Millwall’s Liam Roberts following his red-card challenge on Jean-Phillipe Mateta.

arts.ttl: ‘Not sure they’re strong enough’ – Millwall vs Bristol City prediction: The72
arts.sum: The72's writers offer their Millwall vs Bristol City prediction ahead of the Championship clash on Tuesday. The post ‘Not sure they’re strong enough’ – Millwall vs Bristol City prediction: The72 appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Jean-Philippe Mateta's response to Millwall keeper's post-match message on horror tackle
arts.sum: Crystal Palace striker Jean-Philippe Mateta was left needing 25 stitches after suffering a "severe laceration" to his left ear following a kung-fu kick from Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts

arts.ttl: Preview: Millwall vs. Bristol City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Tuesday's Championship clash between Millwall and Bristol City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
